message:
feat(simulation): tick 210 check_all_expectations_with_cx routes inner check through _with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

TutorialSandbox::check_all_expectations_with_cx (simulation.rs
L1259) threaded cx at the outer loop level (per-iteration
cx.checkpoint at L1277) but the inner expectation-check call at
L1282 used the ambient `check_expectation(&exp.kind)` instead of
`check_expectation_with_cx(cx, &exp.kind)`.

The cx-first sibling exists at L1202 and routes through
`mock.get_text_with_cx(cx, ...)` for the actual read — the exact
reason it was added. Not using it meant the mock read picked up
cx via Cx::current() thread-local fallback.

Tick 210 swaps the call. A long-running expectation-check with
an uncooperative mock (read lock contention under harness stress)
now observes caller cancellation at the mock read boundary rather
than waiting for the next top-of-loop checkpoint iteration.

Verification: 185 / 185 simulation:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
